title: QA/QC Manager (Construction / Facade Projects) #79537
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Building and Construction
  • Position Title: QA/QC Manager (Construction / Facade Projects)
  • Working Location: Redhill
  • Working Hours: 5 Days (Mon - Fri, 8:30AM – 6PM)
  • Salary Package: Basic Salary + AWS + Variable Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Implement and oversee the overall Project Quality Management System (QMS).
  • Prepare and maintain quality-related reports, making recommendations for continuous improvement.
  • Lead and manage a team of QA/QC engineers.
  • Develop and compile Inspection & Test Plans (ITP), Project Quality Plans (PQP), and Operation & Maintenance Manuals (OMM).
  • Ensure full compliance with the Project Quality Plan/Manual throughout project execution.
  • Liaise with clients and subcontractors’ quality representatives.
  • Participate in client audits and ensure company systems are properly implemented.
  • Investigate, document, and resolve quality-related complaints from clients.
  • Recommend improvements on quality matters to the project team.
  • Support QA/QC teams in inspections and testing when required.
  • Coordinate with independent inspection/testing agencies for factory and site inspections.
  • Maintain, improve, and implement quality systems and project quality plans.
  • Investigate quality deficiencies, recommend corrective and preventive actions, and verify implementation.
  • Identify and document quality issues, propose solutions, and ensure resolution.
  • Ensure non-conforming materials, components, and equipment are identified and segregated promptly.
  • Liaise with RE/RTO and relevant parties for inspection and handover of installed steel and façade elements.
  • Perform inspections and checks on all quality-related procedures.
  • Work closely with project managers and supervisors to ensure quality compliance.
  • Ensure timely closure of non-conformance reports (NCR) and site instructions.
  • Carry out any other duties as directed by the Managing Director.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Recognized Degree in a related field.
  • Proven experience working with contractors.
  • Relevant experience in civil/building projects, preferably with façade installation works.
  • Strong leadership skills with the ability to manage a QA/QC team.
  • Excellent communication and coordination skills for liaising with multiple stakeholders.
  • A good team player, adaptable, and able to work in a dynamic environment.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #79537 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
